zh.St Michael and All Angels' Church, Aston: 英國巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓聖 邁克爾 安德 哥吉拉 安爾也 邱奇

zh.Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Aston Apuke於1487年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓時，他的父親Thomas Apuke27歲，母親Catherine Alice Baldwin31歲。他於1504年與Alice Lady Able在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1559年5月19日在他的家鄉享年72歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓聖 邁克爾 安德 哥吉拉 安爾也 邱奇。

zh-hans.Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Aston Apuke于1487年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓时，他的父亲Thomas Apuke27岁，母亲Catherine Alice Baldwin31岁。他于1504年与Alice Lady Able在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1559年5月19日在他的家乡享年72岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓聖 邁克爾 安德 哥吉拉 安爾也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Apuke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pook
meanings: English (mainly Devon): nickname from Middle English p(o)uk(e), poke ‘goblin, (evil or mischievous) spirit’ (Old English pūca).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Aston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Generally a transferred use of the surname, a local name from any of the numerous places in England named with Old English ēast ‘east’ + tūn ‘settlement’, or occasionally æsc ‘ash tree’ + tūn ‘settlement’. There is, however, a Middle English personal name, Astan(us) (probably a survival of Old English Æðelstān), which may have survived in some places in this form.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When John Aston Apuke was born in 1487, in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Thomas Apuke, was 27 and his mother, Catherine Alice Baldwin, was 31. He married Alice Lady Able in 1504, in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 19 May 1559, in his hometown, at the age of 72, and was buried in St Michael and All Angels' Church, Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Aston Apuke est né en 1487, à Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Apuke, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Catherine Alice Baldwin, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Alice Lady Able en 1504, à Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 19 mai 1559, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à St Michael and All Angels' Church, Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Aston Apuke 1487 in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Apuke 27 und seine Mutter Catherine Alice Baldwin 31. Er hat 1504 in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England Alice Lady Able geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 19. Mai 1559 im Alter von 72 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Michael and All Angels' Church, Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Aston Apuke è nato il nel 1487 nel Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Apuke, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Alice Baldwin, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Alice Lady Able nel 1504, nel Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 19 maggio 1559, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a St Michael and All Angels' Church, Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Aston Apukeが1487年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアアストン クリントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Apukeは27歳，母Catherine Alice Baldwinは31歳であった。1504年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリーでAlice Lady Ableと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1559年5月19日に故郷で72歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアアストン クリントンスト ミチャエル アンド アル アンジェルス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Michael and All Angels' Church, Aston: 영국 벅잉함실르 애스턴 클린턴 스트 믹하얼 앤드 앨 앤그스' 처르치
ko.Saint Michael and All Angels Church, Ast: 영국 벅잉함실르 애스턴 클린턴 스트 믹하얼 앤드 앨 앤그스' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Aston Apuke(이)가 1487년 영국 벅잉함실르 애스턴 클린턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Apuke(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Alice Baldwin(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1504년 영국 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이에서 Alice Lady Able(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1559년 5월 19일 그의 고향에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 애스턴 클린턴 스트 믹하얼 앤드 앨 앤그스' 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Aston Apuke nasceu em 1487, em Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Apuke, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Alice Baldwin, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Lady Able em 1504, em Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 19 de maio de 1559, em sua cidade natal, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em St Michael and All Angels' Church, Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Aston Apuke родился в 1487 г. в местности астон клинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Apuke было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Alice Baldwin, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Lady Able в 1504 г. в местности аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 19 мая 1559 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мачаел анд алл ангелс' чурч, астон клинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Aston Apuke nació en 1487, en Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Apuke, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Catherine Alice Baldwin, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Alice Lady Able en 1504, en Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1559, en su pueblo, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en St Michael and All Angels' Church, Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
